title: Tera's Cobblemon Pack
description: Just a lil cobblemon modpack with stunning and varied world gen.
body:
The main focus of this modpack is the Cobblemon, which lets you embark on your very own pokemon adventure, and try to catch them all! Also included are various addons for the Cobblemon mod which all enhance the experience, for example structures at which you can face off against the elusive legendary and mythical pokemon, the ability to ride on certain pokemon for faster travel on land, in water and even in the sky!

There are additionally some mods which drastically improve the world generation. Mods like Biomes O' Plenty and Oh The Biomes We've Gone add various pretty and unique biomes, with all kinds of new blocks to build with. In addition, ReTerraforged gives the world it's shape, which when combined with the new biomes results in stunning and diverse landscapes that provide much to look forward to when exploring and many scenic places to create and build to your heart's desire.
